summary: Iteration 94: Image Replacement Verification Complete. All 6 backend tests PASSED. Verified that ZERO products have Unsplash URLs in their image_url fields. Target products verified: LED Sunset Projection Lamp, Cloud Pillow Slides, and Portable Neck Fan - all now have images from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com. Frontend testing confirmed: Discover page shows 100 product cards with images, login works with test credentials, dashboard loads correctly. TikTok Intel page returns 404 (pre-existing issue, not related to image fix).
